message:
refactor(sync): simplify path denial checks and use idiomatic Rust patterns

Minor cleanup in sync module:
- Replace .iter().any(|v| *v == category) with .contains(&category)
- Simplify secret file extension check: use path.extension() with
  matches! macro instead of manual suffix checking on full filename
- Replace std::io::Error::new(ErrorKind::Other, ...) with the more
  idiomatic std::io::Error::other()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
